ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa Group BYOVD KillAV chain — kernel-driver service install + EDR/AV process termination (gaze.exe / abdullah.exe)
ucs.description: Detects the signature Medusa (Spearwing) defense-evasion playbook called out in CISA AA25-071A: a vulnerable signed kernel driver is registered as a service from a user-writable directory, immediately followed by the operator running KillAV tooling (gaze.exe, abdullah.exe, killav.exe) or PowerShell/sc.exe to terminate Defender, SentinelOne, CrowdStrike or similar EDR processes before ransomware staging.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count earliest(_time) as DriverInstallTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.registry_path="*\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\*" AND Registry.registry_value_name="ImagePath" AND Registry.registry_value_data="*.sys*" AND (Registry.registry_value_data="*\\Users\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\Temp\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\AppData\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\Public\\*") by Registry.dest Registry.registry_key_name Registry.registry_value_data Registry.process_name Registry.user | rename Registry.* as * | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=t count earliest(_time) as KillAVTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND (Processes.process_name IN ("gaze.exe","abdullah.exe","killav.exe","disabler.exe") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","taskkill.exe","sc.exe","net.exe") AND (Processes.process="*MsMpEng*" OR Processes.process="*SentinelAgent*" OR Processes.process="*CSFalconService*" OR Processes.process="*elastic-endpoint*" OR Processes.process="*TaniumClient*" OR Processes.process="*CarbonBlack*" OR Processes.process="*SophosService*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name | rename Processes.* as * ] | where KillAVTime>=DriverInstallTime AND KillAVTime<=(DriverInstallTime+1800) | convert ctime(DriverInstallTime) ctime(KillAVTime) | table DriverInstallTime KillAVTime dest user registry_key_name registry_value_data process_name process parent_process_name
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _UserWritable = dynamic([@"\users\", @"\programdata\", @"\temp\", @"\appdata\local\temp\", @"\appdata\roaming\", @"\public\"]);
let _MedusaKillAVTooling = dynamic(["gaze.exe","abdullah.exe","killav.exe","disabler.exe"]);
let _EdrAvProcs = dynamic(["MsMpEng","SentinelAgent","CSFalconService","elastic-endpoint","TaniumClient","CarbonBlack","SophosService","WinDefend","MDE"]);
// Stage A — kernel driver service registered with ImagePath in a user-writable folder (BYOVD prep)
let DriverInstalls = DeviceRegistryEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActionType == "RegistryValueSet"
    | where RegistryKey has @"\CurrentControlSet\Services\"
    | where RegistryValueName =~ "ImagePath"
    | extend LowerImage = tolower(RegistryValueData)
    | where LowerImage endswith ".sys" or LowerImage has ".sys"
    | where LowerImage has_any (_UserWritable)
    | project DriverInstallTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              ServiceKey = RegistryKey, DriverImagePath = RegistryValueData,
              Loader = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              LoaderCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              LoaderAccount = InitiatingProcessAccountName;
// Stage B — KillAV tool or scripted EDR termination on the same host within 30 minutes
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ (_MedusaKillAVTooling)
   or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","taskkill.exe","sc.exe","net.exe")
       and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Stop-Service","sc stop","taskkill /im","taskkill /f","Stop-Process","net stop")
       and ProcessCommandLine has_any (_EdrAvProcs))
| join kind=inner DriverInstalls on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (DriverInstallTime .. DriverInstallTime + 30m)
| project DriverInstallTime, KillAVTime = Timestamp,
          DeviceName, AccountName,
          KillAVProcess = FileName, KillAVCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ServiceKey, DriverImagePath, Loader, LoaderCmd
| order by KillAVTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _UserWritable = dynamic([@"\users\", @"\programdata\", @"\temp\", @"\appdata\", @"\public\"]);
let _MedusaKillAVTooling = dynamic([@"\gaze.exe", @"\abdullah.exe", @"\killav.exe", @"\disabler.exe"]);
let _EdrAvProcs = dynamic(["MsMpEng","SentinelAgent","CSFalconService","elastic-endpoint","TaniumClient","CarbonBlack","SophosService"]);
// Stage A — Service Installed (4697) with kernel driver image path in user-writable directory
let DriverInstalls = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4697
    | extend SvcImage = tolower(tostring(ServiceFileName))
    | where SvcImage endswith ".sys" or SvcImage has ".sys"
    | where SvcImage has_any (_UserWritable)
    | project DriverInstallTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, ServiceName, SvcImage,
              SubjectUserName, SubjectDomainName;
// Stage B — Process create (4688) for KillAV tooling or scripted EDR termination within 30m
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Img = tolower(NewProcessName)
| where Img has_any (_MedusaKillAVTooling)
   or (Img has_any (@"\powershell.exe", @"\pwsh.exe", @"\cmd.exe", @"\taskkill.exe", @"\sc.exe", @"\net.exe")
       and CommandLine has_any ("Stop-Service","sc stop","taskkill /im","taskkill /f","Stop-Process","net stop")
       and CommandLine has_any (_EdrAvProcs))
| join kind=inner DriverInstalls on Computer
| where TimeGenerated between (DriverInstallTime .. DriverInstallTime + 30m)
| project DriverInstallTime, KillAVTime = TimeGenerated,
          Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName,
          ServiceName, SvcImage, SubjectUserName
| order by KillAVTime desc
ucs.rationale: CISA AA25-071A (March 2025), Symantec/Broadcom and Microsoft (Spearwing) all describe Medusa's distinctive BYOVD chain: drop a vulnerable signed driver into ProgramData/Temp/Users, register it as a kernel-mode service (sc create / New-Service), then run gaze.exe or abdullah.exe (KillAV utilities the group ships with the affiliate kit) to abuse that driver and terminate AV/EDR. Most ransomware crew

ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa Group rclone / MEGAcmd staged exfiltration to mega.nz before encryption
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Medusa double-extortion exfiltration step: an operator runs rclone.exe (or MEGAcmd) configured against a mega.nz remote, followed by direct egress to MEGA infrastructure from a non-browser process. CISA AA25-071A and Broadcom Spearwing reporting list rclone-to-MEGA as Medusa's preferred staging-and-exfil method prior to deploying gaze.exe and the Medusa locker.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count earliest(_time) as ExfilProcTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ((Processes.process_name IN ("rclone.exe","megacmd.exe","megacmdshell.exe","megasync.exe","mega-cmd.exe") AND (Processes.process="*mega:*" OR Processes.process="*mega.nz*" OR Processes.process="*mega.co.nz*" OR Processes.process="* copy *" OR Processes.process="* sync *" OR Processes.process="* move *" OR Processes.process="*--config*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe") AND (Processes.process="*rclone*" OR Processes.process="*megacmd*" OR Processes.process="*mega.nz*" OR Processes.process="*mega.co.nz*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process | rename Processes.* as * | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=t count earliest(_time) as NetTime values(All_Traffic.dest) as RemoteIP from datamodel=Network_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_host="*mega.nz" OR All_Traffic.dest_host="*mega.co.nz" OR All_Traffic.dest_host="*api.mega.co.nz" OR All_Traffic.dest_host="*userstorage.mega.co.nz") AND All_Traffic.app!="chrome" AND All_Traffic.app!="msedge" AND All_Traffic.app!="firefox" by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest_host All_Traffic.app | rename All_Traffic.src as dest All_Traffic.* as * ] | where NetTime>=ExfilProcTime AND NetTime<=(ExfilProcTime+3600) | convert ctime(ExfilProcTime) ctime(NetTime) | table ExfilProcTime NetTime dest user process_name cmdlines dest_host RemoteIP app
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _MegaHosts = dynamic(["mega.nz","mega.co.nz","g.api.mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega.co.nz","gfs.mega.co.nz","ufs.mega.co.nz"]);
let _MegaTooling = dynamic(["rclone.exe","megacmd.exe","megacmdshell.exe","megasync.exe","mega-cmd.exe"]);
let _Browsers = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","arc.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe"]);
// Stage A — rclone/MEGAcmd process configured for MEGA target
let StagedExfilProc = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName in~ (_MegaTooling)
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("mega:","mega.nz","mega.co.nz","--config"," copy "," sync "," move "," put "," login "))
        or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("rclone","megacmd","mega.nz","mega.co.nz"))
    | project ExfilProcTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ExfilProc = FileName, ExfilCmd = ProcessCommandLine, SHA256,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
// Stage B — non-browser network egress to MEGA infrastructure on same host within 1h
let MegaEgress = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_Browsers)
    | where RemoteUrl has_any (_MegaHosts)
    | project NetTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              NetProc = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              NetCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort;
StagedExfilProc
| join kind=inner MegaEgress on DeviceId
| where NetTime between (ExfilProcTime .. ExfilProcTime + 1h)
| project ExfilProcTime, NetTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', NetTime, ExfilProcTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName,
          ExfilProc, ExfilCmd, Parent, ParentCmd,
          NetProc, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort
| order by ExfilProcTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let _MegaHosts = dynamic(["mega.nz","mega.co.nz","g.api.mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega.co.nz","gfs.mega.co.nz","ufs.mega.co.nz"]);
let _MegaTooling = dynamic([@"\rclone.exe", @"\megacmd.exe", @"\megacmdshell.exe", @"\megasync.exe", @"\mega-cmd.exe"]);
let _Browsers = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","arc.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe"]);
// Stage A — process create (4688) showing rclone/MEGAcmd targeting MEGA
let StagedExfilProc = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Img = tolower(NewProcessName)
    | where (Img has_any (_MegaTooling)
             and CommandLine has_any ("mega:","mega.nz","mega.co.nz","--config"," copy "," sync "," move "," put "," login "))
        or (Img has_any (@"\powershell.exe", @"\pwsh.exe", @"\cmd.exe")
            and CommandLine has_any ("rclone","megacmd","mega.nz","mega.co.nz"))
    | project ExfilProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
// Stage B — non-browser DNS/HTTP egress to MEGA via ASIM
let MegaEgress = ImWebSession
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where HttpHostName has_any (_MegaHosts) or Url has_any (_MegaHosts)
    | extend ProcLower = tolower(tostring(parse_json(tostring(SrcUsername))))
    | project NetTime = TimeGenerated, Computer = DvcHostname,
              SrcIpAddr, DstHostname = HttpHostName, Url, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber;
StagedExfilProc
| join kind=inner MegaEgress on Computer
| where NetTime between (ExfilProcTime .. ExfilProcTime + 1h)
| project ExfilProcTime, NetTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', NetTime, ExfilProcTime),
          Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName,
          DstHostname, Url, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber
| order by ExfilProcTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Medusa Ransomware (G1051 / Spearwing) - rclone or MEGAcmd Exfiltration to MEGA Cloud
id: 6f3a1c2e-8b04-4d8f-9c1a-medusa-rclone-exfil
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects Medusa Group (CrowdStrike: Spearwing) data-exfiltration tradecraft prior to ransomware
  deployment - the operator runs rclone.exe / MEGAcmd / MEGAsync (or proxies via PowerShell/cmd)
  configured against a mega.nz remote. Documented in CISA AA25-071A (March 2025) and Broadcom
  Symantec Spearwing reporting.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa25-071a
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1051/
  - https://www.broadcom.com/support/security-center
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_rclone:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\rclone.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'mega:'
      - 'mega.nz'
      - 'mega.co.nz'
  selection_megacmd:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\megacmd.exe'
      - '\megacmdshell.exe'
      - '\megasync.exe'
      - '\mega-cmd.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - ' put '
      - ' sync '
      - ' login'
      - ' cp '
      - 'mega.nz'
  selection_script_proxy:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'rclone'
      - 'megacmd'
      - 'mega.nz'
      - 'mega.co.nz'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_rclone or selection_megacmd or selection_script_proxy) and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned IT use of MEGA for offsite backup (rare in enterprise; allowlist by host)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.exfiltration
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.g1051
ucs.rationale: rclone-to-MEGA is repeatedly attributed to Medusa specifically across CISA AA25-071A, Broadcom/Symantec's Spearwing reporting, and Microsoft's tracking. Medusa affiliates package rclone (often dropped via SimpleHelp / ConnectWise ScreenConnect during initial access) with a pre-built mega.nz remote and stage data immediately before deploying the locker. Joining the rclone/MEGAcmd command-line stage
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
